compiled_state.title: Update CLAUDE.md with red-test-writer and red-test-evaluator agents
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description
Update CLAUDE.md architecture section (named-agent dispatch) to mention dso:red-test-writer (sonnet) and dso:red-test-evaluator (opus). Document the three-tier escalation protocol (sonnet writer → opus evaluator → opus retry → user escalation).

Done Definitions:
1. CLAUDE.md mentions dso:red-test-writer and dso:red-test-evaluator in named-agent dispatch section
2. Three-tier escalation protocol documented in CLAUDE.md

SAFEGUARD FILE: CLAUDE.md is protected per rule 20.

## File Impact
- MODIFY: CLAUDE.md

## TDD Requirement
test-exempt: documentation update. Exemption criterion 3.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
- [ ] `ruff check` passes (exit 0)
- [ ] CLAUDE.md mentions dso:red-test-writer
  Verify: grep -q 'dso:red-test-writer' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/CLAUDE.md
- [ ] CLAUDE.md mentions dso:red-test-evaluator
  Verify: grep -q 'dso:red-test-evaluator' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/CLAUDE.md
- [ ] CLAUDE.md mentions escalation protocol
  Verify: grep -qi 'sonnet.*opus.*escalation\|three.tier.*escalation\|RED.*escalation' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/CLAUDE.md
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
